traits.name: Leadership & Decision-Making
traits.description: Ownership, delegation, calm decisiveness, and ability to guide others, especially under pressure.

traits.name: Team Play
traits.description: Collaboration, supporting teammates, sharing credit fairly, avoiding silo behavior, cross-discipline cooperation.

traits.name: Communication
traits.description: Clarity, honesty, and timeliness of communication with team, management, and clients.

traits.name: Problem-Solving
traits.description: Practical judgment under ambiguity, prioritization, and quality of proposed solutions, at both hands-on and managerial scale.

traits.name: Dispute Resolution
traits.description: Handling disagreements between people/disciplines constructively rather than avoiding or escalating destructively.

traits.name: Organizational Mindset
traits.description: Thinking beyond one's own task to the studio's broader process, resourcing, and client-relationship interests.

traits.name: Ethics & Integrity
traits.description: Honesty in reporting (esp. timesheets/billing), transparency about errors, resistance to pressure to misreport.

notes: All 7 dimensions are scored via situational-judgment options only (no objective/technical MCQ section in this version — technical/software skill is assessed in a separate test and the Personal Interview). Every option carries a trait_deltas vector rather than a single 'correct' answer, reflecting that reasonable people weigh trade-offs differently. Certain options are additionally tagged flag: 'ethics_concern' — selecting one of these surfaces the response for manual reviewer attention regardless of overall score, independent of which topic the question is primarily about (an ethics_concern flag can appear on a Problem-Solving or Organizational Mindset question too, not only on the 2 dedicated Ethics questions per test — this widens the net for catching integrity issues beyond the small ET question quota). Each question also carries a 'topic' field for readability/reporting; scoring itself still runs off trait_deltas dynamically, not the topic label.
